description: A plain candid event photograph with no on-image text or graphic design. It shows a U.S. Navy brass quintet (five sailors in dress white uniforms and white caps) seated on folding chairs on a grass lawn, playing instruments (trumpets/cornets, French horn, tuba, trombone) from sheet-music stands, providing ceremonial music. Behind them are landscaped hedges, palm and other trees, a calm harbor with a moored gray Navy ship and gantry, and mountains under a blue sky with scattered clouds - consistent with the Pearl Harbor setting. Documentary daylight style. Not a designed meme/poster. Tweet context: musical accompaniment for the Memorial Day naturalization ceremony at Pearl Harbor welcoming 11 service members as new U.S. citizens.
